title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50's David Malan discusses why AI still lags behind humans at reliably editing Word documents. The core challenge is that .docx files are structured programs rather than plain text, requiring AI to understand and preserve complex internal logic when making changes. Scaling document editing with AI requires treating documents as software, not files.
